architecturalFeatures.en: Multi-courtyard Southern Fujian temple layout; exquisite ceramic mosaic roof craftsmanship, intricately carved main shrine, spacious forecourt, well-preserved building complex.
architecturalFeatures.zh: 多進式閩南廟宇格局，屋頂剪黏工藝精湛，正殿神龕雕工細緻，廟埕寬闊，建築群保存完整。

en: Note: State-ritual temple adjacent to Datianhougong
zh: 創建年代：明鄭時期（17世紀）
特色：官祀廟宇，與大天后宮相連

historicalContext.en: Built during the Zheng Kingdom era and recognized by successive governments as an official ritual site. Major expansions in the Qing dynasty established it as the state-sanctioned center of Guan Di worship, witnessing Tainan's evolution from immigrant settlement to mature city.
historicalContext.zh: 建於明鄭時期，歷代官府列入祀典，清代進行大規模擴建，成為官方認可的關帝祭祀中心，見證台南從移民社會到成熟城市的演變。

modernUse.en: Now a national historic site open for daily worship; regular Guan Di birthday celebrations held here. Together with the adjacent Datianhougong, forms Tainan's most important religious cultural visit route.
modernUse.zh: 現為國定古蹟，每日開放參拜，定期舉辦關帝誕慶典，並與相鄰大天后宮共同構成台南最重要的宗教文化參訪路線。

description.en: Forecourt upward shot: Shoot upward from a low angle at the main hall ridge; highlight the layered craftsmanship of swallow-tail ridges and ceramic mosaics.
description.zh: 廟埕仰角：站在廟埕前方以低角度仰拍主殿屋脊，突顯燕尾脊與剪黏工藝的精細層次。

description.en: Shrine candlelight: Inside the main hall, capture candlelight reflecting on the shrine — convey solemnity (no flash permitted).
description.zh: 神龕光影：進入正殿拍攝燭光映照神龕的光影效果，感受莊嚴氛圍（注意禁止閃光）。

description.en: Temple corridors: Shoot the symmetric perspective lines of the side corridors; add a human figure to scale the space.
description.zh: 廟宇廊道：拍攝兩側廊道的對稱透視線條，以人物點景增添空間感。

whyItMatters.en: The most important martial temple in central Tainan, dedicated to Guan Sheng Dijun. As an official 'Sidian' (state-ritual) temple, it holds the highest religious status, paired with Datianhougong as Tainan's twin temple landmark.
whyItMatters.zh: 台南城市中心最重要的武廟，主祀關聖帝君，為官方「祀典」廟宇，地位崇高。是台南信仰地景的絕對核心，與大天后宮並稱台南雙廟，每逢節慶人潮眾多。
